{{Extend "layout"}} {{Block "title"}}{{"服务列表"|$.T}}{{/Block}} {{Block "breadcrumb"}} {{Super}}
  • {{"服务列表"|$.T}}
    • {{/Block}} {{Block "main"}}
    {{"删除选中"|$.T}} {{`新建服务`|$.T}}

    {{"服务列表"|$.T}}

    {{- range $k, $v := $.Stored.listData -}} {{- end -}}
    		{{`ID`|$.T}} {{`版本`|$.T}} {{`名称`|$.T}} {{`标签`|$.T}} {{`模式`|$.T}} {{`运行时`|$.T}} {{`任务数`|$.T}} {{`Job状态`|$.T}} {{`时间`|$.T}} {{`操作`|$.T}}
    		{{$v.ID}} {{$v.Version.Index}} {{$v.Spec.Name}} {{range $kk,$vv:=$v.Spec.Labels}}{{$kk}}: {{$vv}}
    {{end}}    		 {{if and $v.Spec.Mode.Replicated $v.Spec.Mode.Replicated.Replicas}} {{`副本数量`|$.T}}{{$v.Spec.Mode.Replicated.Replicas}} {{else if and $v.Spec.Mode.Global}} Global {{else if and $v.Spec.Mode.ReplicatedJob}} {{if $v.Spec.Mode.ReplicatedJob.MaxConcurrent}} {{`最大并发`|$.T}}{{$v.Spec.Mode.ReplicatedJob.MaxConcurrent}}
    {{end}} {{if $v.Spec.Mode.ReplicatedJob.TotalCompletions}} {{`执行次数`|$.T}}{{$v.Spec.Mode.ReplicatedJob.TotalCompletions}}
    {{end}} {{else if and $v.Spec.Mode.GlobalJob}} GlobalJob {{end}}     		{{$v.Spec.TaskTemplate.Runtime}} {{if $v.ServiceStatus}} {{`运行中`|$.T}}{{$v.ServiceStatus.RunningTasks}}
    {{`期望值`|$.T}}{{$v.ServiceStatus.DesiredTasks}}
    {{`已完成`|$.T}}{{$v.ServiceStatus.CompletedTasks}}
    {{end}}     		{{if $v.JobStatus}} {{`迭代次数`|$.T}}{{$v.JobStatus.JobIteration.Index}}
    {{`上次执行`|$.T}}{{$v.JobStatus.LastExecution.Local.Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05"}}
    {{end}}     		{{`创建`|$.T}}: {{$v.CreatedAt.Local.Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05"}}
    {{`更新`|$.T}}: {{$v.CreatedAt.Local.Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05"}}
    {{$.Stored.pagination.Render}}
    {{/Block}} {{Block "footer"}} {{/Block}}
